elements.name: TC-OBS-001 | REQ-OBS-001 GET /Observation/{id} returns 200 and resourceType = Observation
TC-OBS-002 | REQ-OBS-002 status is a valid ObservationStatus value
TC-OBS-003 | REQ-OBS-003 code.coding has system and code
TC-OBS-004 | REQ-OBS-004 valueQuantity has value and unit (conditional)

steps.name: if (!hasEntry) karate.log('TC-OBS-004: SKIP — no Observation with valueQuantity found on server')

elements.name: TC-OBS-006 | REQ-OBS-006 | REQ-GEN-002a meta.lastUpdated is present

elements.name: TC-OBS-008 | REQ-GEN-001 captured observation-read.json exists for HL7 Validator
